data.title: Star Entertainment Appoints New Director Steve McCann
data.description:
Star Entertainment Group Limited (AU:SGR) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Star Entertainment Group Limited has announced the appointment of Steve McCann as a new director, effective from December 2, 2024. McCann holds 10,517,458 unquoted performance rights, as approved by shareholders at the recent Annual General Meeting. This move is likely to attract attention from investors keen on the company’s strategic direction and leadership changes.

data.title: Greatland Gold Unveils New Presentation and ASX Plans
data.description:
Greatland Gold (GB:GGP) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!

Greatland Gold plc, a company listed on the London Stock Exchange, has released an updated corporate presentation showcasing its assets, including the Telfer gold-copper mine and the Havieron project in Western Australia. The company is also planning a dual listing on the Australian Securities Exchange by mid-2025, highlighting its growth ambitions in the gold and copper mining sector.

data.title: EV Resources Sees Major Shift in Shareholder Voting Power

EV Resources Limited has experienced a significant change in its substantial holdings, with Sunshore Holdings Pty Ltd increasing its voting power from 7.62% to 17.69%. data.title: Foresight Group Extends Share Buyback Program to £15 Million
data.description:
Foresight Group Holdings Ltd. (GB:FSG) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Foresight Group Holdings Ltd. has announced an extension of its share buyback program, increasing the repurchase amount by £5 million, bringing the total to £15 million. This strategic move, managed by Deutsche Numis, aims to optimize the company’s cash resources and benefit shareholders while balancing other capital priorities like mergers and acquisitions. Foresight continues to uphold its commitment to delivering attractive returns and supporting sustainable growth through its diversified investment strategies.

data.title: Blencowe Resources Boosts Capital with New Share Issue
data.description:
Blencowe Resources Plc (GB:BRES) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Blencowe Resources Plc has announced the exercise of warrants by its directors and senior management, raising £126,000. The company will issue 3,150,000 new ordinary shares, which are set to be traded on the London Stock Exchange. This move will increase the company’s total voting rights to 295,226,620, allowing shareholders to reassess their interests.

data.title: Metro Mining Raises $2.58 Million Through Share Issuance
data.description:
Metro Mining Limited (AU:MMI) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Metro Mining Limited has issued over 102 million new shares to Nebari Natural Resources, raising approximately AUD 2.58 million. This move follows the conversion of Nebari’s Tranche 2 Subscription Warrants at an exercise price of AUD 0.02502 per warrant. The issuance was conducted without disclosure under the Corporations Act, highlighting Metro’s compliance with relevant regulations.

data.title: NHK Spring Exits Chemical Products Business
data.description:
NHK Spring Co., Ltd. (JP:5991) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

NHK Spring Co., Ltd. is set to terminate its chemical products business, transferring its operations to Toyo Quality One Corporation. This strategic move, effective from April 2025, is not expected to impact NHK Spring’s financial forecasts significantly. The company has expressed gratitude to its supporters as it pivots away from manufacturing polyurethane foam products.
